```{r}
#| include: false
library(targets)
library(tarchetypes)
library(RSQLite)
Sys.setenv(`_R_USE_PIPEBIND_` = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| include: false
#| eval: false
tar_unscript()
tar_prune()
```

```{targets globals}
#| label: globals
#| tar_globals: true
#| tar_interactive: false

library(tarchetypes)

Sys.setenv(`_R_USE_PIPEBIND_` = TRUE)
tar_option_set(packages = c("dplyr","readr","readxl","writexl","univariateML",
                            "RSQLite","reticulate"))

#list.files("./r", "\\.R$", full.name=TRUE) |>
#  lapply(source)

# Load order of source files important for S4.
source_files <- list(
  "clope.R","datafile.R","datafile_class.R",
  "datafile_csv.R","datafile_unkwn.R","datafile_xls.R",
  "dataset.R","detect_colnames.R","detect_limit.R",
  "detect_method.R","detect_rownames.R","detect_units.R",
  "dps.R","dps_cluster.R","dps_datafiles.R",
  "dps_export.R","dps_extract.R","dps_metadata.R",
  "dps_profile.R","dps_score.R","encode_format.R",
  "has_unit.R","metadata.R","new_score.R",
  "plot_donut.R","profile_data.R","proj_list.R",
  "score_accessibility.R","score_accuracy.R","score_completeness.R",
  "score_complexity.R","score_consistency.R","score_coverage.R",
  "score_freshness.R","score_metadata.R","score_skewness.R",
  "score_uniqueness.R","score_usability.R","value_class.R",
  "value_format.R"
)
paste0("./r/", source_files) |>
  lapply(source)
```

```{targets}
#| label: data_files
#| tar_interactive: false
list(
  tar_target("dps_client_files", "./data"),
  tar_target("dps_db_file", "./output/catalogue")
)
```

```{targets}
#| label: dps_data
#| tar_interactive: false
#| tar_simple: true
dps(dps_client_files) |>
  dps_export(dps_db_file)
```

```{r}
#| include: false
o <- tar_outdated()
if (length(o) > 0) {
  tar_make()
  tar_load(o)
}
tar_load_everything()
```

```{r}
#| include: false
#| eval: false
con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), paste0(tar_read(dps_db_file), ".sqlite"))
dbListTables(con)

dps_dataset <- dbReadTable(con, "dataset")
dps_datafiles <- dbReadTable(con, "datafiles")
dps_profile_field <- dbReadTable(con, "profile_field")
dps_profile_table <- dbReadTable(con, "profile_table")

dbDisconnect(con)
```
